synopsis: [El-errata] ELSA-2025-17453 Important: Oracle Linux 7 firefox security update
full_text:
Oracle Linux Security Advisory ELSA-2025-17453

http://linux.oracle.com/errata/ELSA-2025-17453.html

The following updated rpms for Oracle Linux 7 have been uploaded to the Unbreakable Linux Network:

x86_64:
firefox-140.3.0-1.0.1.el7_9.x86_64.rpm


SRPMS:
http://oss.oracle.com/ol7/SRPMS-updates/firefox-140.3.0-1.0.1.el7_9.src.rpm

Related CVEs:

CVE-2025-10527
CVE-2025-10528
CVE-2025-10529
CVE-2025-10532
CVE-2025-10533
CVE-2025-10536
CVE-2025-10537




Description of changes:

[140.3.0-1.0.1]
- Update to 140.3.0 [Orabug: 38509157][CVE-2025-10527][CVE-2025-10528]
  [CVE-2025-10529][CVE-2025-10532][CVE-2025-10533][CVE-2025-10536]
  [CVE-2025-10537]
- Disable SVE parts of libyuv if not supported [Orabug: 38509157]
